description_long: This is a compact, tracked military vehicle with a utilitarian, rugged design, featuring a main body and a separate trailer. The main vehicle is equipped with continuous metal tracks for all-terrain mobility and has a low, angular profile with armored panels and a small, raised dome or hatch on top. The trailer is also tracked and carries several cylindrical barrels, likely for fuel or supplies, secured on a flatbed platform. The vehicle's exterior is finished in a weathered, olive-drab paint with visible wear and grime, suggesting heavy use. The front of the vehicle has a sloped glacis plate and what appears to be a grille or vent, while the rear trailer is open and utilitarian. No visible weapon mounts or heavy armaments are present, and the vehicle appears designed for logistical or support roles in combat scenarios.
description: A small, tracked military vehicle with a matching tracked trailer carrying barrels, finished in weathered olive-drab paint and armored panels.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the trailer with barrels and the back of the main vehicle, highlighting the tracked undercarriage.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the vehicle and trailer, with clear visibility of the tracks and the barrels on the trailer.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the sloped armor, grille, and the compact width of the vehicle, with the trailer offset behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main vehicle's profile and the trailer's flatbed with barrels, as well as the continuous tracks.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible armor plating covers the full body of the main vehicle, with sloped and angular panels of moderate thickness; no modular or reactive features are apparent.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Weathered olive-drab paint with some brown patches, no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White numbers visible on the front lower plate; no other insignia or symbols present.
